title: Ability to select an item in a group with the option "Move to Bottom"
excerpt: Can you please create an option to select an item in a group with the feature to “move to bottom” within the group. Currently there is only a “move to top”

posts.author: mleo (Martha Leo)
posts.cookedHtml: Can you please create an option to select an item in a group with the feature to “move to bottom” within the group. Currently there is only a “move to top”
